name: Lam
tips: Lam excels at ganking squishy mid laners early game
Use 1-2-3-A combo for burst damage
Focus on invading enemy jungle when ahead

faqs.question: Can Lam invade early jungle?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lam has strong early damage and can safely invade at level 2.

faqs.question: Is Lam good against Augran?
faqs.answer: Lam has moderate advantage against Augran due to his mobility.

faqs.question: What is Lam combo order?
faqs.answer: 1-2-3-A is the standard burst combo.

name: Angela
tips: Always stick to your carry during team fights
Use ultimate to revive allies in critical moments
Position yourself safely while healing

faqs.question: Is Angela good for beginners?
faqs.answer: Yes, Angela is one of the easiest supports to learn.

faqs.question: Can Angela heal multiple allies?
faqs.answer: Her 1st skill heals nearby allies.

faqs.question: When should I use Angela's ultimate?
faqs.answer: Use it to revive your main carry or turn a team fight.

name: Augran
tips: Position yourself at maximum range while attacking
Use 1st skill to kite enemies
Ultimate can be used to escape or chase

faqs.question: Is Augran good in Season 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, Augran is a top-tier marksman this season.

faqs.question: What build does Augran use?
faqs.answer: Swift Strike, Berserker's Fury, Demon Hunter are core items.

faqs.question: How to play Augran safely?
faqs.answer: Always stay behind your tank or support.

name: Hou Yi
tips: Use your ultimate to stun enemies from long range
1st skill can hit multiple targets
Farm safely early game

faqs.question: How to aim Hou Yi's ultimate?
faqs.answer: Predict enemy movement or use it on crowded team fights.

faqs.question: Is Hou Yi better than Augran?
faqs.answer: Both are strong, Augran has higher mobility, Hou Yi has range.

faqs.question: What is Hou Yi's combo?
faqs.answer: 1st + auto attacks, ultimate for stuns.

name: Musashi
tips: Use your ultimate to dodge enemy CC
Combo: 2-1-3 for maximum burst
Split push and join team fights

faqs.question: Can Musashi solo carry?
faqs.answer: Yes, Musashi is an excellent split pusher and team fighter.

faqs.question: What to build on Musashi?
faqs.answer: Shadow Blade + Divine Blade core.

faqs.question: How to counter Musashi?
faqs.answer: Use CC and burst him down quickly.

name: Marco Polo
tips: Use your mobility to reposition in fights
Ultimate is great for team fights
Build attack speed and crit

faqs.question: Is Marco Polo hard to play?
faqs.answer: Yes, he requires good positioning and mechanical skill.

faqs.question: What lane is Marco Polo?
faqs.answer: Gold Lane (ADC).

faqs.question: How to counter Marco Polo?
faqs.answer: Burst him down before he can kite.

name: Loong
tips: Use your 1st skill to poke safely
Ultimate is powerful in team fights
Position at the backline

faqs.question: Is Loong a mid laner?
faqs.answer: Yes, Loong is a mid lane mage.

faqs.question: What build for Loong?
faqs.answer: Boom Stick, Glowing Wand, Divine Wizardry.

faqs.question: How to combo with Loong?
faqs.answer: 2-1-Ult for maximum burst.

name: Daji
tips: Hide in bushes to surprise enemies
Use 2-3-1 combo to burst squishies
Don't overextend early

faqs.question: Is Daji good for beginners?
faqs.answer: Yes, simple burst combo and mechanics.

faqs.question: What is Daji's combo?
faqs.answer: 2 (stun) + 3 + 1 for full burst.

faqs.question: How to counter Daji?
faqs.answer: Use magic resistance items.

name: Yaria
tips: Farm jungle quickly and gank early
Use ultimate to sustain in fights
Invade enemy jungle when possible

faqs.question: What build does Yaria use?
faqs.answer: Tank/bruiser hybrid build.

faqs.question: Is Yaria a tank jungler?
faqs.answer: Yes, she has good sustain and durability.

faqs.question: How to play Yaria?
faqs.answer: Farm fast, gank often, initiate fights.

name: Luban No.7
tips: Use passive for consistent damage
Position safely behind your team
Farm early items before fighting

faqs.question: Is Luban good for beginners?
faqs.answer: Yes, very simple mechanics.

faqs.question: What build for Luban?
faqs.answer: Standard ADC attack speed and crit.

faqs.question: How to counter Luban?
faqs.answer: Burst him down quickly.
